company.name: CL Global Academy
company.category: Cambridge academic and cultural immersion programmes
company.positioning: Academic programmes in Cambridge that combine rigorous courses, project-based learning, cultural immersion, and global student networks.

audiences: University students seeking AI, data science, engineering, and systems-thinking courses
Students aged 13-18 seeking advanced academic research preparation
Parents comparing credible supervised Cambridge programmes
Schools, universities, and institutions interested in bespoke course partnerships
Academic and industry instructors considering collaboration
buyer_needs: Understand course fit quickly by age, dates, and academic level
See how Cambridge housing, dining, culture, supervision, and project work fit together
Apply or enquire without hunting through the site
Understand the independence and partnership model clearly
current_site_strengths: Strong proof metrics and alumni testimonials
Useful course detail on linked pages
Transparent independence disclaimer in footer and partnerships page
current_site_gaps: Course routes are not visible early enough on the homepage
Application journey is not explained as a workflow
Proof is separated from some key conversion decisions
Course dates and audiences are buried on the courses page
Partnership/form details are not easy to understand from the homepage
redesign_goal: Create a polished, contentful, video-led homepage that makes CL Global Academy's Cambridge programmes easier to understand, trust, apply for, and enquire about.
design_strategy: Keep the current Cambridge video as the immersive first-viewport signal
Make Apply now and Explore courses visible in the hero
Place proof metrics beside the first decision
Add a programme journey tracker from application through alumni network
Turn the 2026 catalogue into three clear course cards
Add transparent partnership and independence language near credibility claims

live_partnership_form.submit_endpoint: Not exposed in static HTML; appears runtime/recaptcha dependent.
live_partnership_form.reuse_decision: Do not clone a private Strikingly submission endpoint. Link to live partnerships page and preserve mailto routes.
